title: libblockdev  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.2.0-5.0.1]
- enable btrfs support [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.2.0-5]
- Don't allow suid and dev set on fs resize
  Resolves: RHEL-96031
full_text:
[3.2.0-5.0.1]

[3.2.0-5]
